shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @David-001: identical host face, charcoal sweater, Archive desk, brass lamp, same eye-line — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Documentary-Prestige-001: documentary prestige grade — rich midtones, restrained contrast, natural skin texture, subtle film grain, trustworthy broadcast gravitas, no beauty-filter smoothing, no Instagram saturation. Host seated at Archive worktable, warm brass lamplight, speaks calmly to camera. Camera: slow gentle push-in medium. Warm gold brass desk lamp 3200K key light locked — zero hue drift, amber pool only on desk and face, no magenta purple ambient, no cool fill, no glasses purple reflection. Motivated practical key only — no unmotivated beauty dish, no fashion rim, lamp or window must be visible or implied. COLOR LOCK Archive: dominant amber 3200K, wood tones burnt umber #3D2B1F to #5C4033, parchment cream #F5F0E6, shadow neutral warm grey #2A2520 — no blue fill, no magenta cast, no teal shadows. GRADE LOCK Documentary-Prestige: skin warmth +3% amber max, shadows warm-neutral not blue, saturation overall -10% vs reality, highlight roll-off soft — forbid magenta midtones, forbid teal shadows, forbid orange skin push. Slow motivated push-in or locked-off medium; handheld only for insert B-roll — never jitter on host. Lip-synced, delivers: "I am DAVID. Today, Sumerian — not Indo-European, not Semitic — the first language we meet written in clay, five thousand years before our microphones existed." mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible never stuffy, synthetic host only. Finish on gesture peak (hand motion or lean), never hold dead stillness or dead frame.

provenance_card.title: DAVID · The Archive
